subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath turned towards God, the All-Compelling, the Self-Subsisting. Say: Fear ye God and do not abandon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اقبل الی الله المهیمن القیوم قل اتقوا الله و لاتدعوا
subcodes.subjects: @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @angels, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings, @exhortations and counsels, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
